testsuite.name: it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystemTest

testcase.name: StopAlarm with correct PIN transitions from ALARM to DISARMED
Sensor events are ignored during EXIT_DELAY
Sensor in active zone triggers entry delay
Arming the system transitions through EXIT_DELAY to ARMED
Invalid PIN does not stop alarm
Invalid PIN does not arm the system
Sensor event in ARMED state triggers ENTRY_DELAY then ALARM
Sensor events are ignored in DISARMED state
Sensor in inactive zone does not trigger entry delay

testsuite.system-err: [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO org.apache.pekko.event.slf4j.Slf4jLogger - Slf4jLogger started [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - AlarmSystem started in DISARMED state. Active zones: [LIVING_AREA, SLEEPING_AREA, PERIMETER, GROUND_FLOOR, UPPER_FLOOR] [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - State transition: DISARMED → EXIT_DELAY [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - EXIT DELAY started (1 seconds) — leave the house now! [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - State transition: EXIT_DELAY → ARMED [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - Exit delay expired — system is now ARMED (active zones: [LIVING_AREA, SLEEPING_AREA, PERIMETER, GROUND_FLOOR, UPPER_FLOOR]) [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - Sensor event: type=MOTION, zone=LIVING_AREA, triggered=true [state=ARMED] [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - State transition: ARMED → ENTRY_DELAY [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - ENTRY DELAY started for zone LIVING_AREA (1 seconds) — enter PIN to disarm! [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - State transition: ENTRY_DELAY → ALARM [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - Entry delay expired — ALARM TRIGGERED in zone LIVING_AREA [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - State transition: ALARM → DISARMED [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-5] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - Alarm STOPPED — system DISARMED [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-3] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - AlarmSystem started in DISARMED state. Active zones: [LIVING_AREA, SLEEPING_AREA, PERIMETER, GROUND_FLOOR, UPPER_FLOOR] [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-3] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - State transition: DISARMED → EXIT_DELAY [AlarmSystemTest-pekko.actor.default-dispatcher-3] INFO it.unibo.smarthome.alarm.AlarmSystem - EXIT DELAY started (1 seconds) — leave the house now!
